mapper.insert: INSERT INTO repair_log (asset_id, reported_by, reason, estimated_cost, status) VALUES (#{assetId}, #{reportedBy}, #{reason}, #{estimatedCost}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM repair_log WHERE asset_id = #{assetId} AND status = 'IN_PROGRESS' ORDER BY start_date DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM repair_log ORDER BY start_date DESC
